decisions.label: Approve traced queue for staging
decisions.description: Accept traced queue mode for controlled staging use
required_evidence: Staging test passes (all lifecycle types observed)
forbidden_assumptions: Does not override operator per-instance approval

decisions.label: Keep untraced queue
decisions.description: Continue with untraced mode, defer traced queue enablement
required_evidence: Operator understands traced mode is available on request
forbidden_assumptions: Does not mean traced mode is rejected forever
Does not mean traced mode is unsafe

decisions.label: Request more fixtures
decisions.description: Current evidence insufficient; request additional fixture coverage
forbidden_assumptions: Does not mean evidence is insufficient by default

decisions.label: Block traced queue
decisions.description: Block traced queue mode due to safety or operational concerns
forbidden_assumptions: Does not mean traced mode is permanently unsafe
Does not prevent re-evaluation in future
Does not affect untraced mode operation
